original_image_tags: A pink FBI Teletype document dated July 8, 1947, regarding a "Flying Disc" near Roswell, New Mexico. The document contains typed text describing a hexagonal disc suspended from a balloon, multiple handwritten signatures and initials in the margins, and several filing stamps including one dated July 22, 1947.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A single scanned pink teletype/FBI memorandum page with typed text, stamped date markings, and multiple handwritten annotations and initials in ink.*
